title: Inverse Finance - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation involving flash loan to manipulate collateral price and withdraw inflated amount of DOLA

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates collateral price using flash loans and subsequently borrows an unusually large amount of DOLA

red_flags: Large flash loan followed by manipulation of collateral price and borrowing an unusually large amount of DOLA
monitoring_rules: BLOCK txs manipulating collateral price using flash loans and borrowing unusually large amounts of DOLA
summary: The attacker manipulated the oracle to inflate the collateral price using a flash loan, then borrowed an unusually large amount of DOLA, and finally withdrew the inflated value. A guard could have blocked this by detecting flash loans followed by oracle manipulation and large DOLA borrows.
